user_query: I'm planning a surprise party for my best friend's birthday and I need some inspiration for decorations. Can you suggest some unique and creative ideas? Additionally, I would like to gather some images related to party decorations to get a better idea. Also, find me some YouTube videos that showcase amazing party decoration ideas. Furthermore, I need to search for local party supply stores in my area to purchase the necessary items. Your assistance is greatly appreciated.

TaskList.description: Gather unique and creative decoration ideas for a birthday party from various online sources.
Collect images related to party decorations that align with the ideas gathered in Step 1.
Find YouTube videos that showcase amazing party decoration ideas to provide visual inspiration.
Search for local party supply stores to purchase necessary decoration items based on ideas and images collected.
